# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Template specification
- [ ] Checklist
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Calculator design
- [ ] Governance or repository structure

## Practitioner Review

- [ ] Uses New Zealand terminology.
- [ ] Avoids confidential client information.
- [ ] Identifies assumptions.
- [ ] Includes reviewer prompts where needed.
- [ ] Does not present general information as personalised advice.

## Notes

Add any extra context for reviewers.
